title: Document enterprise security and compliance boundaries
outOfScope: Implementing runtime isolation, identity, cryptographic signing, or external compliance certification.
Release publication and execution-plan cleanup reserved for Work Items 7 and 8.

sources.reason: Review marks enterprise security/compliance as a boundary and current NO-GO claim.
Current Trust Layer non-goals and boundaries.

riskAssessment.reason: Documentation-only boundary clarification with explicit non-goals.

preReviewWarnings: Record what the template governs and what requires external security/compliance controls.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The security boundary document distinguishes repository governance evidence from external security/compliance controls.
The document preserves the review's enterprise NO-GO and non-goal boundaries.
No runtime isolation, identity, cryptographic, or certification claim is introduced.

intent.problem: Review findings could be misread as enterprise security certification unless repository governance evidence is separated from external controls.
constraints: Document boundaries only; do not implement runtime security controls.
intent.rationale: A control-boundary document makes the Trust Layer's evidence useful without implying it replaces identity, isolation, scanners, provider controls, or compliance assessment.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Repository governance evidence and external enterprise controls are explicitly separated.
Runtime isolation, trusted identity, cryptographic proof, and certification remain documented non-goals.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized automatic serial execution, PR merge, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
